CustomField.description: When enabled, NPPatch enforces data integrity rules on Payments and Opportunities. This includes ensuring Payment amounts match the Opportunity Amount, preventing deletion of Payments on closed Opportunities, and validating that required accounting fields are populated. Disabled by default. Enabling this may surface existing data inconsistencies as validation errors.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enforce consistency rules on Payments and Opportunities, such as requiring Payment amounts to match the Opportunity Amount.
CustomField.label: Enforce Accounting Data Consistency
